title: tinus ternatensis
intro: Tinus ternatensis, also known as the Strychnine tree or Log tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Loganiaceae. The plant's medicinal properties include its use in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, particularly its alkaloid compounds have shown potential in treating fever and inflammation. The health benefits of Tinus ternatensis include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help to protect against oxidative stress and inflammation-related diseases. In herbal preparations, the plant's bark and seeds are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although caution is advised due to the presence of toxic compounds.
